programme.title: New: Piers Morgan: Uncensored
programme.desc: The bold, opinion-led news and debate show hosted by Piers Morgan. Piers blends journalism, debates and cultural commentary that's unapologetically direct.

programme.title: Georgie & Mandy's First Marriage
programme.desc: Audrey and Mary go to war over CeeCee and Georgie, and Mandy can't help but take sides. S1/Ep10

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Nameya is after both beauty and brains: will she find her perfect package in a sexy guy or her first ever girlfriend? Dan loves a fairy-tale, but she's yet to find her leading man.

programme.title: Warlock
programme.desc: Fantasy horror with Julian Sands and Richard E Grant. Using magic, an evil warlock flees to 80s LA from the olde-worlde. Can he unmake creation before a witch-finder tracks him down?
(1989) Fantasy with Richard E Grant. A witch-finder tracks an evil warlock to 80s LA.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do submarine crews survive submerged beneath the ocean for months at a time? Plus, how do crash test dummies make driving safer? S4/Ep3

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Nasly is brought in with a life-threatening complication of diabetes. Charlie has bad chest and back pain and a complex medical history. Nurse Alison has a busy shift in Injuries.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Benson suspects Rob Miller to be responsible for the death of a girl found in Hudson River, but due to lack of evidence she cannot apprehend him. (S20 Ep 24)

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: A butcher from Somerset brings a meaty lipoma on his neck for Dr Dev Shah. Dr Toby Nelson has a patient with a skin condition around her eyes. (S4 Ep6)

programme.title: New: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: When the plan to smuggle marijuana from Mexico into the U.S. was interrupted, Steve Peterson faced time behind bars... unless he could find a way to escape. (S8 Ep5)

programme.title: New: Devil in Disguise: John Wayne Gacy
programme.desc: Billy: US drama based on real events. Tovar and Kozenczak examine how systems failed to stop Gacy's murders, and a romance develops between Billy Kindred and Mary Jane. [S,AD] S1 Ep4

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Dust Devils' critical water supply runs dry. Jacqui and Andrew find their biggest nugget so far, while the Poseidon Crew are hit by torrential rain. S6/Ep10

programme.title: Murder On CCTV
programme.desc: In Dalton, Georgia, a convenience store employee is stabbed at work. Security footage reveals a disturbing revelation about the killer's identity. S8/Ep15

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: Guy checks out a Bosnian restaurant in Tucson, AZ, serving up Eastern European specialities to a place frying favourites in Wilmington, NC. S28/Ep9

programme.title: Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: The Old Vicarage has terrifying reports of paranormal activity. With 800 years of history attached to the hotel, will the team be able to identify the spirits? S4/Ep3

programme.title: 1986: Most Shocking Moments
programme.desc: Controversial moments, from celebrity scandal and sporting skulduggery to bare bottoms on TV - featuring Grange Hill's drugs storyline, Maradona's 'Hand of God' and EastEnders' gay couple.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers settle down for more of the biggest and best TV. What do they think this time?

programme.title: Paranormal: Caught On Camera
programme.desc: Beginning in Peach Springs, Arizona, an explorer films a shadow figure on the infamous Route 66.

programme.title: The Jonathan Ross Show
programme.desc: Jonathan's guests for this edition include Traitor Alan Carr, Scream franchise star Neve Campbell, and the husband-and-wife duo of comedian Rob Beckett and author Lou Beckett. [S,HD] S23 Ep2

programme.title: The Wrap With Gillian Joseph
programme.desc: Debate, analysis and insight on the biggest news stories of the day from the UK and around the world.
